caveats: Power BI Desktop practice export only; no embedded report or external credential is connected.
CFS Economics is screening-level context, not a formal appraisal or billing determination.
Tables exclude contact fields, credential fields, model internals, and probability-style outputs.

visuals: KPI cards: assessed value coverage, underbuilt candidates, opportunity signals, data confidence

domain_readiness_dim.next_data_need: Add current appraisal extract if missing.
Add official utility, school, and transportation service assumptions.
